name: Fighting Perry and Winfrey In A Court of Law
original_name: Fighting Perry and Winfrey In A Court of Law
overview: A Docu-series of events of two prose litigants Terri and William that go toe to toe with Hollywood moguls, Tyler Perry and Oprah Winfrey over U.S. Copyrighted works that span over a decade evolved into a Civil RICO case April (2017). Season 1 is available on Prime Video and is 6 episodes 62 min each and has a Season 2 in postproduction.

trailers.title: Season 1-Fighting Perry and Winfrey In A Court of Law A Docuseries - Trailer
